goal: 继承旧产品技能目录发现导入 UX

summary.title: 继承旧产品技能目录导入 UX
summary.what: 新增 shared skills.discover control-plane action，并把 sidepanel 技能管理页的“导入已有技能”恢复为旧产品式目录扫描导入。MV3 runtime 现在可从 BrowserVFS 的 mem://skills package roots 发现带 SKILL.md marker 的 package-backed skill，自动安装到 product skill library，刷新 skills.summary，并在 audit.tail 写入扫描、发现、安装、跳过计数。
summary.why: 用户明确要求 UI/UX 直接继承旧产品，不能把粘贴 SKILL.md 的自创路径当主流程。本轮把旧产品可用的目录发现/导入体验接回 shared AI Surface，而不是在 sidepanel 维护 app-local skill truth。
summary.user_goal: 继承旧产品技能目录发现导入 UX

decisions.point: 旧产品 Skill 导入主路径
decisions.chose: 使用 skills.discover 扫描 mem://skills 等 BrowserVFS package roots 并自动安装 package-backed skills。
decisions.rationale: 旧产品 UX 是发现/导入已有目录中的技能包；这条路径能复用 shared lifecycle、summary 和 audit，而不是让用户粘贴 SKILL.md。
rejected: 继续把粘贴 SKILL.md 内容作为导入已有技能的主路径

decisions.point: 产品 UI truth 来源
decisions.chose: sidepanel 只发送 skills.discover management action，并继续消费 skills.summary items。
decisions.rationale: 保持 AI/product consumer 和 UI 共享同一 control-plane/action/resource 面，避免重新引入 app-local package registry。

decisions.chose: skills.discover audit entry 记录 root、scanned/discovered/installed/skipped counts。
decisions.rationale: 目录导入是写操作，需要 operator-visible evidence 才能支持 cutover/UAT 验收。

review_notes: 验证：bun run check 通过，39 个 test files / 702 tests 全绿；git diff --check 与 git diff --cached --check 均通过。
真实 Chromium MV3 验证已覆盖 UI 点击“导入已有技能” -> 输入 mem://skills -> “扫描并导入”，并读回 skills.summary 与 audit.tail；Browser 插件 iab 不可用时使用 Playwright fallback。

Mainline preflight 仍报告 notes_rewrite_drift 和多个旧产品 UX proposed overlaps；已通过 mainline doctor --notes --json 与 active intent append 复核为历史 notes rewrite 噪音，以及同一 codex/verify-origin-main stacked branch 上互补 UX slice，不构成本轮语义冲突。

architectural_claims: skills.discover is a northbound product control-plane action for BrowserVFS package-root discovery and lifecycle installation.
Sidepanel skill import consumes shared skills.discover / skills.summary / audit.tail surfaces instead of maintaining app-local package truth.
behavioral_changes: The sidepanel Skills management import button opens a directory discovery panel instead of a raw SKILL.md paste draft.
Discovering mem://skills installs marker-backed package skills, refreshes skills.summary, and writes skills.discover audit evidence.
Skill runtime context exposes ctx.skills.discover(input) and forwards discovery payloads without requiring a skillId.

api_changes.signature: skills.discover audit entry with root and scanned/discovered/installed/skipped counts

data_model_changes.name: SkillDiscoverAuditEntry
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Adds a new discriminated audit entry for discovery counts; existing lifecycle audit entries remain unchanged.

security_implications: skills.discover is marked medium risk with writes side effects and requires skills.discover permission.
Discovery scans BrowserVFS roots and package markers; it does not add host filesystem access.
migration_notes: Old product Skill directory discover/import UX is now represented by shared skills.discover rather than a sidepanel-only import flow.
